posts.author: kll (Kristen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Widgets are a great way to digest information within a board, but it would be helpful to see the filters when looking at a chart – e.g. summarize the filters within header

What are you trying to achieve

Integrating the filters into the header of any chart would allow me to understand what data I am displaying. Unless I’m missing something, currently when viewing a chart I can see that the filter icon is highlighted, but to understand what subset of the data is being displayed in the chart, you currently have to open the filter to view the active filters. This limits my ability to export the chart and have it mean anything or be at all useful…
